summary: W1.2 visual-only upgrade regression + new feature testing on FieldAssure AI static marketing site. Verified: new HeroProofStack visual on desktop (1920px) and tablet (768px) - central card + 6 mini-cards render with zero overlap and readable text; mobile (390px) correctly switches to simplified 2-column stacked grid with no absolute positioning and no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth==clientWidth on Home and Pricing); hover lift/shadow/border effects work correctly on Roles cards (verified translateY + border/shadow change on hover); How It Works 5 steps render correctly with all data-testids intact, arrows are purely decorative (not interactive); Request Demo form (all 7 fields with correct data-testids) submits client-side only with ZERO network calls to /api and shows exact success message; FAQ accordion expand/collapse works, Q3 now asks about 'one country' with geography-aware answer; Footer description updated to geography-aware/global copy; mobile hamburger Sheet menu opens with all nav links + CTA. Full-site text search across Home, /product, /use-cases, /pricing, /about, /request-demo confirmed ZERO occurrences of 'india' or '+91' anywhere. No stock photos, fake logos, testimonials, or compliance-guarantee claims found (Phosphor icons only).

design_issues.screen: Mobile hamburger Sheet menu (pre-existing shadcn Dialog/Sheet component, not part of this iteration's scope)
issues: Console warnings: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' and missing aria-describedby - minor accessibility issue, not introduced by this iteration, low priority

critical_code_review_comments: HeroProofStack.jsx cleanly separates desktop (absolute-positioned, 'hidden md:block') from mobile (static grid, 'md:hidden') layouts - verified both render correctly with no overlap at 1920px, 768px, and 390px widths.

Hover lift effects (translate-y-1, shadow, border-amber-300) correctly applied via Tailwind transition classes on Roles/Modules/Pricing cards and How It Works steps - verified via bounding_box comparison before/after hover (y decreased ~14px, matching hover:-translate-y-1).
Arrow connectors in HowItWorksSection are plain decorative Phosphor icons positioned absolutely, not wrapped in interactive elements - correctly non-clickable.

Request Demo form fields, testids (request-demo-input-name/company/email/phone, request-demo-select-role/project-size, request-demo-textarea-message, request-demo-submit-btn, request-demo-success-message) all unchanged from W1 and functioning correctly with zero network calls confirmed via request listener.

Full grep across frontend/src confirmed zero 'india' or '+91' string matches - positioning language fully migrated to geography-aware/global copy across Hero badge, subheadline, Footer, FAQ Q3, and AboutContact placeholder page.
Minor pre-existing a11y warning (Sheet/DialogContent missing DialogTitle) noted in console logs - unrelated to this iteration's scope, not a regression.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: W1.2 visual upgrade fully verified with no bugs. Hero proof stack, hover effects, arrow connectors, gradient Request Demo section, and full India-first-to-geography-aware copy migration all confirmed working across desktop (1920px), tablet (768px), and mobile (390px) breakpoints. Nothing outstanding to fix. Only a pre-existing minor a11y console warning on the mobile Sheet menu (missing DialogTitle) was noted, not part of this iteration's scope.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found in this iteration
